# Syntalix Consultancy Services
> India-based AI/ML and software development consultancy serving India and international clients.

## Services
- [AI & ML Infrastructure](/services): Custom AI and machine learning systems for business workflows.
- [LLM Engineering](/services): Large language model integration, fine-tuning, and application development.
- [Agentic AI Systems](/services): Autonomous agent workflows and AI automation systems.
- [Web Development](/services): Enterprise websites, web applications, and e-commerce platforms.
- [Mobile Development](/services): iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile applications.
